transcript:
Hello, main Inspector Sharma bol raha hoon, Delhi Police Cyber Cell se.
 Ji, boliye.
 Aapke Aadhaar card ka galat istemal hua hai. Money laundering case mein naam aaya hai.
 Turant verify karna hoga. Aapna account number aur IFSC code batao, nahi toh arrest warrant nikalega.
 Par maine toh kuch nahi kiya!
 Jaldi karo, time nahi hai. OTP bhi aayega, woh bhi batao.
explanation: 🆔 Personal/identifying information requested; ⚠️ Threatening or intimidating language used | Keywords: Aadhaar, account number, OTP
